insight: Bounded elicited construction of certified-resolved-and-wrong patches produced 0 witnessed rows against a >=5 bar. Of 16 candidates, 6 matplotlib executed and were certified-resolved but identical to gold across their full test module (undetermined, not correct); 10 django/astropy were not executable by a bare-pytest harness (django testbed lacks pytest; astropy collection gap). The uncurated-test oracle is coverage-bound (iter139 lesson), and the harness gap is a fitness gap, not a scientific negative. The null is honest and grounded in real container execution.
